The following is a list of test cases for the requirement "Headset Initiated ACL Connection Establishment":

1. Test case T-0: Verify that the AG can establish a complete audio connection towards the HS by initiating a call/audio connection from a test device.
2. Test case T-1: Verify that the HS accepts a complete connection establishment initiated from the AG by initiating a call/audio connection from a test device and confirming the HS's response.
3. Test case T-2: Verify that the AG can cause the HS to give an in-band ringing tone during connection establishment initiated from the AG by initiating a call/audio connection and confirming the HS's response.
4. Test case T-3: Verify that the HS gives an in-band ringing tone during connection establishment initiated from the AG by initiating a call/audio connection and confirming the HS's response.
5. Test case T-4: Verify that the AG accepts a connection release initiated from the HS by initiating a call/audio connection and confirming the HS's response.
6. Test case T-5: Verify that the HS accepts an audio connection release initiated on the AG by initiating a call/audio connection and confirming the HS's response.
7. Test case T-6: Verify that the AG accepts a connection release initiated from the HS by initiating a call/audio connection and confirming the HS's response.
8. Test case T-7: Verify that the AG can establish an outgoing connection to the HS upon user action on the HS (e.g. last dialed or pre-programmed number).
9. Test case T-8: Verify that the HS accepts an audio connection transfer from HS to AG initiated on the AG by initiating a call/audio connection and confirming the HS's response.
10. Test case T-9: Verify that the AG accepts an audio connection transfer from HS to AG initiated on the HS by initiating a call/audio connection and confirming the AG's response.
11. Test case T-10: Verify that the AG can perform an audio connection transfer from AG to HS initiated by a user action on the HS.
12. Test case T-11: Verify that the HS accepts an audio connection transfer from HS to AG initiated on the AG by initiating a call/audio connection and confirming the HS's response.
13. Test case T-12: Verify that the AG accepts a connection release initiated on the HS by initiating a call/audio connection and confirming the HS's response.
14. Test case T-13: Verify that the HS accepts an audio connection transfer from HS to AG initiated on the AG by initiating a call/audio connection and confirming the HS's response.
15. Test case T-14: Verify that the AG accepts a connection release initiated on the HS by initiating a call/audio connection and confirming the HS's response, and that the correct speaker volume settings are used when establishing a new connection.
16. Test case T-15: Verify that the HS accepts an audio connection transfer from HS to AG initiated on the AG by initiating a call/audio connection and confirming the HS's response, and that the HS returns to Standby mode after the transfer.

These test cases cover all possible scenarios related to the requirement "Headset Initiated ACL Connection Establishment" and can be used to verify the interoperability and functionality of the system.
